description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and clean, angular lines, surrounded by stylized landscaping that includes large, rounded boulders and clusters of trees. The house features a mix of white and dark brown exterior finishes, with large windows and a prominent entryway that is accessed by a short set of steps. The front facade includes a covered porch area and a pathway leading up to the main door, while the rear and sides are bordered by natural elements, providing privacy and a sense of integration with the environment. The roof appears to have a skylight or open section, and the overall structure is low and wide, emphasizing horizontal proportions. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The landscaping is minimalistic, with the house set against a backdrop of trees and rocks, enhancing its modern appeal.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and dark brown finishes, surrounded by boulders and trees. The design is clean and angular, with a prominent entryway and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a pathway, flanked by boulders and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, skylight, and the house's integration with the surrounding boulders and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more boulders, and a cluster of trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's width, additional landscaping, and the minimalistic rear entry area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a short set of steps, covered porch, and a simple, modern door; minimal decorative elements.
